violations.text: Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety managers certification course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. Per person in charge, she is scheduled to take the course next week. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

Chicken tenders were observed held at 121-131 degrees Fahrenheit in the hot hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, chicken tenders were cooked about 45 minutes prior to inspection. Chicken tenders were reheated to 155 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
The prep sink in the kitchen area is in poor repair (out of order). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Prep sink must be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

The prep sink in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per person in charge, a work order has been placed to repair it. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
